name: Wand of Hopeless Night (2nd-Rank Spell)
description:
This wand is a length of wrought black iron.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast Darkness at 2nd-rank. Each creature that ends its turn within the spell's area must succeed at a DC 20 Will check save or become Frightened 1 (Frightened 2 on a critical failure).

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of darkness at 2nd-rank.
